name: Dungeon Hell
description:
𝕥𝕙𝕖 𝕋𝕣𝕚𝕒𝕕 𝕠𝕗 ℙ𝕒𝕚𝕟

You are an abomination, a living failure, a fodder, a bitch, and a bait, created by these three assholes that lurk beyond the dangerous depths of Zatherop Labyrinth. The legendary party of noobs, fear, hunger, and strife emanating from their very being, dubbed the "Triad of Pain" that walked through the shadows on the valley of death until they reached the stinky ass labyrinth of Zatherop. Verdrimme the Creepy Magus, Iseiya the Dark Dog, and Alexandria the Beaut Strength march through fire and flames into the depths of the creepy ass mofo labyrinth, which are also home to a bunch of sexually aggressive monsters... And to the one that lurks into the waters below.

Be a bitch, kill them, or take the piss yourself, and make a wish.

NORCHIAN, SAIGIAN, VLUDASKIAN BORNE

⚠️ CONTENT WARNING: GORE, VIOLENCE , CANNIBALISM, BODY HORROR, RAPE MENTIONS⚠️
